techcrunch.title: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
techcrunch.summary: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

techcrunch.title: Meta acquired Moltbook, the AI agent social network that went viral because of fake posts
techcrunch.summary: Meta says that Moltbook's approach to "connecting agents through an always-on-directory" is novel.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
techcrunch.summary: Anthropic launched Code Review in Claude Code, a multi-agent system that automatically analyzes AI-generated code, flags logic errors, and helps enterprise developers manage the growing volume of code

techcrunch.title: OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to secure its AI agents
techcrunch.summary: This deal underscores how frontier labs are scrambling to prove their technology can be used safely in critical business operations.
